chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-633 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.5221/25. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A No.5222/25. 4. For hearing of main case. 11.06.2025. Mr. Ali Nawaz Chandio, Advocate for Applicant/accused. *_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_* Through this Cr. Bail Application, Applicant Khalid Hussain s/o Ghulam Muhammad Rajput seeks protective bail in Crime No.26 of 2025 registered at Police Station Kotri, District Jamshoro under Section 489-F PPC. Learned Counsel appearing on behalf of Applicant seeks protective bail as he states that there is a grave apprehension that the Applicant would be taken into custody by the Police authority, before being given a chance to appear before the learned Trial Court. He further submits that the Applicant had issued a cheque to Mr. Abdullah Pathan for some construction work to be carried out. Due to some dispute between the Applicant and Mr. Abdullah Pathan, he i.e. Abdullah Pathan without having any legal right to do so, transferred the said cheque to the complainant, namely Mr. Aijaz Jatoi. Learned Counsel further states that the Applicant wants to appear before learned Trial Court but requires protection to do so. Without touching merits/demerits of the case, protective bail for a period of Ten days from today is granted to the Applicant/Accused, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand only) and a P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiration of ten days, or when the Applicant surrender, before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier.

Without touching merits/demerits of the case, protective bail for a period of Ten days from today is granted to the Applicant/Accused, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand only) and a P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiration of ten days, or when the Applicant surrender, before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. And during such period the N.B.Ws, if any, issued by the Trial Court shall remain suspended. In case the Applicant fails to appear/surrender before the concerned Court within the stipulated period, the surety furnished by him before this court shall automatically stand forfeited. This Cr. Bail Application along with pending Applications stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ali.
